segments.text: On the other hand, they're really good at getting out to the ledge
segments.original_text: 逆によく外に逃げてるなって感じですね

segments.text: If you keep fighting in that range, you'll just loop endlessly
segments.original_text: 雨で勝負しすぎるとずっと9にループしちゃうんで

segments.text: You have to properly escape to the outside
segments.original_text: ちゃんと外に逃げなきゃいけないです
深めに飛び込むトートル

full_text: On the other hand, they're really good at getting out to the ledge If you keep fighting in that range, you'll just loop endlessly You have to properly escape to the outside Incredible! Turtle diving in deep!
